Deprecated API

Contents

  • Deprecated Interfaces
  • Deprecated Methods
  • Deprecated Interfaces 
    Interface and Description
    com.mentor.chs.api.IXHarnessDiagramPhysicalUnit
    This interface should not be used as there is no object of this type available or accessible in the system. Please use XGraphicsUnit instead.
    com.mentor.chs.api.IXVariantWire
    use IXConductorVariant instead
  • Deprecated Methods 
    Method and Description
    com.mentor.chs.plugin.constraint.IXModuleAssignationResult.addModuleCodeToCombinationForTechnicalModule(String, XMC)
    please use addModuleCodeToCombinationForTechnicalModule(String, Set, Set)
    com.mentor.chs.api.IXConnector.geAncestorModularConnectorNames()
    The procedure for getting modular connector is changed, instead use getOccupiedPosition() and getPositionContainer().
    com.mentor.chs.api.IXHarness.getActiveHarnessLevels()
    A new means of getting active objects from a design is available. To get the active harness levels from a harness use: IXIntegratorDesign#getActiveObjects(IXHarnessLevel, IXHarness). IXIntegratorDesign#getActiveObjects will only return harness levels when in composite mode
    com.mentor.chs.api.IXDevicePin.getCavity()
    instead use IXAbstractPin.getConnectedPins() which supports both single and multi-mating
    com.mentor.chs.api.IXTerminal.getCavityDetail()
    - replaced by IXTerminal.getOwner()
    com.mentor.chs.api.IXCavitySeal.getCavityDetail()
    - replaced by IXCavitySeal.getOwner()
    com.mentor.chs.api.IXCavity.getCavityPlug()
    - replaced by IXCavity.getPinPlug()
    com.mentor.chs.api.IXCavityDetail.getCavitySeal()
    - replaced by IXCavityDetail.getSeal()
    com.mentor.chs.api.IXLibraryScope.getCustomer()
    use getScope instead
    com.mentor.chs.api.IXFolder.getDesign() 
    com.mentor.chs.plugin.architect.IXScenario.getDesign() 
    com.mentor.chs.api.IXProject.getDesigns()
    Avoid using this method as this can load significant data into memory when there are many designs in a project thus causing performance and capacity issues. To load specific designs, use IXProject.getDesigns(Class, List)
    com.mentor.chs.api.IXProject.getHarnessDesigns()
    Avoid using this method as this can load significant data into memory when there are many harness designs in a project thus causing performance and capacity issues. To load specific designs, use IXProject.getDesigns(Class, List)
    com.mentor.chs.api.IXConnectivityObject.getInstances()
    This method doesn�t scale well for big projects. Use IXConnectivityObject.getInstances(Set) instead.
    com.mentor.chs.plugin.styles.IXGraphicsAttribute.getLineThickness()
    You will not ba able to get physical thicknesses with this method. Please use IXGraphicsAttribute.getThickness() method instead.
    com.mentor.chs.api.IXLibraryScope.getManufacturingOrganization()
    use getScope instead
    com.mentor.chs.api.IXCavity.getMatedCavity()
    instead use IXAbstractPin.getConnectedPins() which supports both single and multi-mating
    com.mentor.chs.api.IXCavity.getMatedDevicePin()
    instead use IXAbstractPin.getConnectedPins() which supports both single and multi-mating
    com.mentor.chs.api.IXDesign.getScopeScodes()
    - replaced by IXDesign.getScopeCodes()
    com.mentor.chs.plugin.IXCurrentContext.getSelectedObjects()
    Use getSelectedObjects(Class<O> filterClass) which is a more advanced version.
    com.mentor.chs.plugin.constraint.IXModuleAssignationResult.getTechModuleCombinationMap()
    you should now use @link #getTechModuleMap() getTechModuleMap.
    com.mentor.chs.plugin.styles.IXGraphicsAttribute.setLineThickness(int)
    You will not be able to set physical thicknesses with this method. Please use IXGraphicsAttribute.setThickness(IXGraphicSize) method or IXGraphicsAttribute.setThickness(double, XGraphicsUnit) method instead.
    com.mentor.chs.plugin.designinspection.IXInspectionPanel.update(IXApplicationContext)
    Use change listener approach to update the panels.
